message:
Fix publish workflow attestations inputs

Remove unsupported attestations input from tree-sitter reusable
workflows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,15 +11,13 @@ concurrency:
 permissions:
   contents: write
   id-token: write
-  attestations: write
 
 jobs:
   github:
     name: Release to GitHub
     uses: tree-sitter/workflows/.github/workflows/release.yml@main
     with:
       generate: true
-      attestations: true
   prebuilds:
     name: Build prebuilds (${{matrix.os}})
     needs: github
@@ -149,4 +147,3 @@ jobs:
       PYPI_API_TOKEN: ${{secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN}}
     with:
       generate: true
-      attestations: true
